creator: rsimmons@pfy.wlcg.com
text:
The daily run output email that tells you the denied zone transfers (AXFR and
IXFR) does not reset every night.  It keeps reporting all the denied transfers
and seems like its keeping a running total.

This feature should reset every night in a similar way to the rejected mail
hosts section.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Setup named to deny transfers and try a transfer from a disallowed host.
Check this field after a few days.  It will not reset.
